content_markdown: The shock absorbers of a car, in good working condition, ensure that the vertical oscillations of the car are

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram provided in the image.

vibe_explanation: Shock absorbers are designed to return the car to its equilibrium position as quickly as possible without further oscillation. This specific condition is known as critical damping. If it were underdamped (lightly or moderately), the car would continue to bounce, which is unsafe and uncomfortable.
